description: Initial manifest for planned eval harness commands.

planned_modules.name: compile.py
planned_modules.purpose: Compile a submitted custom HIP kernel for a task and target architecture.

planned_modules.name: test.py
planned_modules.purpose: Run visible correctness tests and emit a correctness result JSON.

planned_modules.name: baseline.py
planned_modules.purpose: Run or prepare the strongest applicable vendor/framework baseline.

planned_modules.name: benchmark.py
planned_modules.purpose: Collect HIP-event timing for submission and baseline sweeps.

planned_modules.name: compare.py
planned_modules.purpose: Compare submission timing and correctness against a baseline record.

planned_modules.name: archive_attempt.py
planned_modules.purpose: Archive successful and failed attempts with metadata and classification.

planned_modules.name: report.py
planned_modules.purpose: Generate per-task, per-architecture, and corpus-wide reports.
